mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book_item WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY storage_time DESC
SELECT bi.* FROM book_item bi INNER JOIN book b ON bi.isbn = b.book_no WHERE b.id = #{bookId} AND bi.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bi.storage_time DESC
SELECT * FROM book_item WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY storage_time DESC
